Roy Dennis Roofing easily qualifies for 5 Stars!

His communication was excellent, and the turnaround time was impressively quick. It's rare to find a team that combines efficiency with such great customer service. I highly recommend Absolute Roof Solutions to anyone looking for reliable and trustworthy roofing professionals. Thank you again Michael. It has truly been wonderful working with you. I called Absolute Roofing and spoke with Daniel. He was pleasant and quick to respond. They sent Will out to inspect the roof and he identified the issues and came up with a plan and estimate. The cost was reasonable. When the rain finally stopped Kizi came and did the work. She almost finished a day ahead of schedule. The work was beautifully done and even to my untrained eye it looked way better than before. The work was all done according to plan and as quoted with no extra unexpected costs. It has since rained heavily and no leaks. Excellent experience with Absolute Roofing in all aspects.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Christina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUejLwUESFIc51SMO71vCd2e5X2atz1fDtUY4Ca4Txc9dOlNqMqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Got my roof replaced last week. I was a little nervous as this was the first major update I have done on my home and I was worried it would be complicated and disruptive. But I was pleasantly surprised how easy and quick the process was. David was professional, efficient and quick to respond to my messages and provided excellent communication throughout the job. The bulk of the work was done in just 2 days and I am very happy with the final results. Thank you again to the team that worked on my home!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBcrsq_mQ-4YtFYRLC17ulb&fid=0x0:0x21815f533f6620ac"],"When":"2025-10-27"},{"Name":"Isamu Fujiwara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL_4Og65TP38R2TPhUnlx88HafR78I2GSmw-C7FC7jNI1qSPQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently noticed a bulge on my ceiling that looked like possible water damage and was worried there might be a roof leak. I called to request an inspection of both the roof and attic, and from the very first interaction, the experience was excellent. The person who answered the phone was friendly, listened carefully to my concerns, and was able to schedule an appointment the very same day. I also appreciated receiving an upfront estimate before any work began.

Will and his assistant arrived right on time and were both professional and courteous. They took great care inside the house, making sure carpets stayed clean and placing rags before entering the attic. They thoroughly inspected the attic, took photos, and clearly explained their findings. Thankfully, there was no issue with the roof, which was very reassuring.

What really impressed me was that they went above and beyond the scope of the roof inspection. Instead of stopping there, they investigated further and discovered the true source of the moisture — an HVAC pipe that wasn’t properly sealed to the diffuser. They could have simply said the roof was fine and left it at that, but they took the extra step to find the real cause.

I was extremely impressed with their honesty, professionalism, and attention to detail. Highly recommend this company!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mark Wallace MacKay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXi0gLdsP6SQdWEGFytwUu-l4jWVL0gsHnGlVFQdkMDMolU8T34=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Kizi Melo (an Absolute Roof Solutions technican) restored 2 decks, both getting older and weathered, in our Kitsilano duplex. She provided excellent service, very competent workmanship, detailed in ensuring that all torchon membranes were fully restored. The decks look new again, and I'll sleep better knowing the roof decks are well maintained.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC14fI5SrxId2YjDGhINnyw&fid=0x0:0x21815f533f6620ac"],"When":"2025-9-19"},{"Name":"Michael L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJWmVa5clHn0Ehod5yiVD866mCxGgm6tp-oWguDG5g7OzGJAQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"During solar panel installation, the technician advised the plywood was very wet along one side of the roof.  The roof was only 12 yrs old.  They took and provided photos.  The solar panel installation was halted. I contacted several roofing companies to get assessments on the issue and obtain estimates.  It turns out one side of the roof did not have adequate venting and moisture was being absorbed by the plywood.  I met with several roofing company representatives and each provided their suggested way to address the issue...and the estimated costs were all over the map. But when I met with the Absolute Roof Solutions sales representative...I knew I had found the right company.  They explained what the issue was, how they would address it and the next steps.  They followed with a quote and then a follow up conversation with the Project Manager.  They picked a date that was to be rain free.  The crew showed up on time and they went about their work.  Taking 1/2 a roof is not an easy task but they managed to get it done in the one day...and to get the site all cleaned after, including ensuring all debris was removed from both neighbours yards.  Great job Absolute Roof Solutions.  It was a very positive roof repair/replacement experience and very happy to recommend Absolute Roof Solutions.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Clayton Gates","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWo34GpVM8Q-hHRq1VIZ2mXz-vYQxCuXxrC9vO7avwfCDq-dDc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After contacting several companies to quote on a new roof for my families first house in Vancouver we decided to go with Absolute. Not because they were the least expensive but they did a thorough inspection, showed us problems other companies didn’t find and provided detailed scope of work in their quote where we felt confident it was an all in quote. No surprises would come up during the project and we would be extremely happy with the final product. I didn’t want to take a chance on my first home and they were by far the most professional quote we received and didn’t want to take chances with a cheaper “new roof for $xx quote, unsure of what a “new roof” meant to this company vs our expectations. Will update when project is complete","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Uma Yogendrakumar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLfitmQGgemb1Ff97hTdcn0n6ocIFc3rQ_TE2y8b0rrtoC7SQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our roof was replaced last week. The project manager David and Michael were very helpful and answered all queries with clarity before and after the installation. Cleaning around the property was well done.","Images":null,"When":""}]

The team cleaned up every day and kept me updated with progress photos throughout. They did a great job and I would highly recommend them!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carl Lum","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSRGuPwov4aPPoD_HaL4gsNcSZ8Vex25vT77JrFGm3yqyxX-d5KA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I chose Cooper Roofing because they impressed us with detailed estimates, helpful staff, and top notch professionalism. Sebastian did a great job of describing the work and made us feel reassured. Their workers were quick and friendly, and Volkan was very knowledgeable and helpful.

When the job was done, the final inspection report was detailed and provided lots of photos and overhead drone shots. We are satisfied that we have a quality roof that'll last many years (if not the rest of our lives). I will add that Cooper was actually the highest price of all our estimates, but we still feel we got good value for the money.

One caveat though: Cooper takes no responsibility for interior damage and they state that right in their contract. We had our skylight replaced and the new skylight removed the old interior trimming, leaving some bare wood and gaps exposed. When we asked Cooper if they could add a decorative strip to cover these gaps, we were surprised that they told us to go find a drywall contractor to finish the job! This after the thousands of $$$ of business we gave them. We also received conflicting reasons why they didn't include the trim.

However after some negotiating, we arrived at a solution satisfactory to both parties, even though it wasn't 100% what we expected. But it's close enough and we consider the matter closed.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCV_5KG4snnrIdN3kfkcGVa&fid=0x0:0xa74891fa06dda3dc"],"When":"2025-7-31"},{"Name":"Bryan Belyk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU0p6Op7LtCSv-33GqzYdIEYArRUBAZg9qQRpFJgFZLsP1zTqhJNQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently hired Cooper’s Roofing for a fascia repair on our mixed residential/commercial building, and we couldn't be happier with the results. After receiving several quotes, Kenny and Arpinder stood out by offering the most effective technical solution using flashing, all while providing the most competitive price.
​The quality of the workmanship is top-notch. What we appreciated most was Kenny’s flexibility; he was incredibly accommodating when we requested a few changes mid-project. It’s rare to find a team that balances high-quality technical skill with such great customer service. Our strata has already decided to work with Kenny and Arpinder for our future roofing needs. Highly recommended","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Emilio & Laura","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUFXAD3_3mKB8fhFPxrWg0talt0PlEeeHJ4n_jqFZ8d6OW8n3g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"These guys have been great to deal with! [{"Name":"Helen Spiegelman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJ1PCGKSa0pwNEKQax_cgt57oIAPKbQDQm4kqi9IU1pVvl2QyX=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is the third house that we've had re-roofed by Regan Roofing. If we live long enough to have another house that needs a roof done, it will be by Regan Roofing. This company should give lessons. They were fitted out with impressive safety gear -- climbing harnesses and good boots. They started with an emergency visit before Christmas, sealing up a leak with a temporary tarp, and then they came back as soon as the snow cleared and did the job start to finish.  They did a complete job, scaling off the rotten tiles, catching them on tarps and stowing them in a bin. Then a layer of plywood, a layer of black waterproofing paper and the top layer of asphalt tiles. The crew was headed up by the owner, son of the founder who did our first roof. They were cheerful and friendly and worked long, hard and carefully every day until the job was done. The didn't quit until sunset and then did a meticulous clean-up in the dark! Hard work, well done! Thanks, guys!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICdtOyRAQ&fid=0x0:0x53928bc79929ab79"],"When":"2024-2-12"},{"Name":"The Bigcheese","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVnx-haaPT7IWsfNkX6yW1bYFs2IIIg8cMwssje27kQ0W-RpE4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent experience. We recommend this company for anyone involved in drainage system issues..","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICr3JfzqwE&fid=0x0:0x72d1888df2d430eb"],"When":"2024-7-5"},{"Name":"james Boyle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLRom-vBInVxVBogKCuhKDenQk7k7da8zicRimrciw0DNznYw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’d used Kerrisdale Drains about 20 years ago and was impressed. I would recommend you discuss your house problems with Tim and his company.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ben Zimmer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIpucBYLYl_IthPsNfTJPG0UeTzYH2JUACzzICj_qcGeNDRPg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tim & Kim were very easy to work with. We were re-roofing my senior mom's home and they were very understanding to how the commotion may upset her. The workers were extremely respectful and polite when dealing with my mom. The yard was cleaned and all the debris was removed. The workmanship was excellent. We are very pleased with the quality and service provided by Kerrisdale Roofing. I would definitely recommend Kerrisdale Roofing. Thank you Tim and Kim for for a job well done.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rick Leung","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV8oA_oHN9_jWQMRm3QL-ihUsWQ-n6CmDWR4oEw5hk4uK6p-103aw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tim and his crew at Kerrisdale Roofing have been phenomenal in helping me replace my asphalt shingles roof.

The disastrous atmospheric river event in Nov (2021) revealed a leaky roof at my place. After multiple failed attempts to temporarily patch it up myself, I figured I might as well bite the bullet and go for the nuclear option of replacing the entire roof -- the shingles only, obviously.

From the moment when I first called, Tim has always been open and upfront about everything. He was initially uncertain of when he'd be able to fit my job into his schedule because of the ones he already has on hand, but he promised to get back to me, and he did. He was down-to-earth and had my interests in mind when he came for the estimate. Instead of recommending something that was fancy (and probably could have gotten him a nicer profit), he offered a recommendation that was practical while being more economical. He took the time to explain to me the features and qualities of the roof that I would be getting, and he even recommended a colour that turned out to work much better with the rest of my house instead of the plain, simple black that I had in mind.

When the time came to actually install the roof, his crew was professional, friendly, and obviously cared about the quality of their work. They took the time to explain to me what was wrong with my previous roof shingles installation, and how their installation would specifically avoid those pitfalls. They were efficient with their work. They were spot on with their estimate on how long the job would take. And they did a good clean up of everything around the house when the project was finished.

During the removal of the old shingles, the crew discovered that parts of my chimney and the associated flashings were in such a shape that they should really be repaired. Despite their observations and recommendations, they were never pushy about making me hire them for the additional repair work. Still, I was glad to have them help me with it, and they readily arranged to have their mason come for this at a later date.

I am obviously not a roofing expert by any means, but I find the workmanship and attention to detail of both the roofing job as well as the chimney job to be excellent. And throughout the project, Tim has maintained an excellent line of communication with me -- from keeping me informed about the dates, times, and costs; notifying me of any changes in schedules, and generally being available (or get back to me in a timely manner) to answer any questions I might have, and I appreciate that.

One final caveat that I am compelled to mention is the inherent uncertainty involved with weather-dependent repair projects. December to February in Vancouver is hardly the best time to work on these types of projects. Still, Tim and his crew made their best effort to plan their work around the weather, and help me get the repairs done as soon as the conditions allow. And when they were here, they wasted no time in making sure that the work goes right on schedule. I appreciate that.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Wendy S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_RG5etSOb9kZnaMS0tlpWbuoPvYCTd_hRiVuBxGwrR81wbD5DkA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"LOOK NO FURTHER – go with JMT Roofing!

Here’s why:

- The owner, John, is honest, compassionate, and takes real pride in the quality of his workmanship.

- He treats his team with respect, and you can see that motivation reflected in the great work they do.

- Before giving a quote, John personally inspects your roof—unlike salespeople who rely only on satellite images and miss important details.

- His pricing is fair, and he uses top-quality shingles, underlay, and materials.

- He doesn’t cut corners—he replaces all old metal instead of re-using it.

- He even adds extra roof vents (without you having to ask), showing his commitment to doing the job right.

- Communication is excellent—you get daily updates with photos so you always know what’s happening.

- Cleanup is thorough and leaves no mess behind.

- Best of all, the warranty is transferable to a future homeowner if you ever sell your house.

I learned the hard way that not all roofers are the same. A couple of years ago, I used a large roofing company, Penxxxxx, and was completely disappointed. When I reported issues afterward, the salesman who sold me the job passed me off to the repair department and never spoke to me again (and the repairs were not done up to standard).  With JMT Roofing, the experience was the exact opposite—personal, professional, and trustworthy from start to finish.

Did I not say it all here? If you want peace of mind and a roof done right—JMT Roofing is the one to call!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCj4zUNTMC4SxUYck3Vz6LF&fid=0x0:0xfe397a6c07238486"],"When":"2025-9-13"},{"Name":"David Pickrell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxlva0pjrofzJ-R3DN9bTPs_tJ2cuMqpOUfzOom8Vltp1dY6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Quality workmanship highlighted by superb customer service.  John and his team have been doing this for a long while.  His turnover on his team is low because he recognizes having engaged, good people on a job make everyone happier.

Our roof was done on time and on budget and I have to say that his team was very friendly and made certain that they left the jobsite clean every day.

As the job progressed we got regular pictures of the progress.  John would inform us what steps were next so we always knew what was happening on our roof.

I take great efforts to research companies who work on my home and JMT was an excellent choice and I can recommend them without hesitation.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEMqZtIaLycKxEQ&fid=0x0:0xfe397a6c07238486"],"When":"2025-6-4"},{"Name":"Dave Ballance","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYX6nq_HLwpfRDMsBw6lLqPrWnr9cBkodLmufnMfPWG9e9gYI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"JMT roofing is awesome, reliable and reasonably priced.

I noticed moisture in my attic and contacted JMT. Within an hour, John had someone check it out and I had a quote for a new roof within days. Two weeks later I had a new roof for a great price.

Staff were friendly and the workmanship was top notch. John uses the best materials available and stands behind his work.

John checked in daily during the install and they sent me photos of the work progress everyday.

John noticed my front facia boards to my peaks were rotten and he not only replaced them, he gave me time to paint them before they went up. They also noticed my bathroom vents were not vented properly and they helped me remedy this issue quickly and at no new cost.

I can’t say anough about JMT and John. You won’t find a better roofing company.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCIzLKnmwE&fid=0x0:0xfe397a6c07238486"],"When":"2025-3-30"},{"Name":"Mike Personal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKI3Qr7P4_bbomeZmaC9BytjxAjgmbGYRDjvnUhMLXKfMD7Ww=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This summer we replaced our cedar shake roof with asphalt along with all our gutters and had the pleasure of working with John and his crews. The quote John provided was reasonable, and he thoroughly outlined all the work to be done and materials required. He was responsive to our questions and sent pictures daily showing the roofing crew's progress. Both crews were professional, hard working and efficient. The windows and deck skylight were protected throughout the projects and the site was cleaned at the end of each day. Both crews did an exceptional job. We are extremely happy with the final projects and would highly recommend JMT!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Olivia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJsiz5MRV_dSdQeILy_z6RQ_elNqAqS26rLwiyhhoNMv-Tzgg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"John and his team were amazing to deal with. Their customer service was top notch! They were quick to get back to us, well priced, came in on budget. The work was done on time and they left the job site clean everyday. They even updated us with pictures of the progress and were available for any questions we has. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDgn_uSDA&fid=0x0:0xfe397a6c07238486"],"When":"2025-2-28"},{"Name":"Faiyaz Ali","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtG5Q2-GIilfeYrKPvPns10ELU5SXUgwpFsV0AchxJz1XguELY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"JMT roofing experience was above and beyond what we expected. The quality work, great communication, professional service is second to none. Would not hesitate to recommend them, all staff and processes were excellent and we're confident we got excellent value for our money. The care they put into making sure every detail was taken care of from start to finish is commendable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEJDMkvL34L_eSA&fid=0x0:0xfe397a6c07238486"],"When":"2025-5-14"},{"Name":"Why Bee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUFuhV9kyfG7eazUty3FPOoCLo-8gi1gQEQp9VqXvROR7uA3Zk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I looked at different roofing companies to replace my roof as there was a leak and it needed to be replaced as it was over 30 years old.  I chose John and JMT roofing because I liked his honesty of what his service provides and answered all my initial questions.  His price may have cost a bit more but it was well worth it as he has his own team and does not sub-contract.  He also got his team to come out and patch the leak immediately free of charge while I waited for his team to come out at a later date to replace my roof.  His team takes pictures at the end of each day to show progress and any questions or concerns would be answered almost immediately by a phone call or text.  I'll be recommending his service to my friends for sure.

-Terence","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Amy Ng","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHfXKkjMuIjiZqAH5i9e5tASZ4v35dX5StjHV2yX-D5qkCB20=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had my house roof replaced last month and was very impressed with the whole experience. He gave me a quote, came back as agreed. The roof was fixed, flattened and new drain was added. I am happy with the work and the cost was reasonable. They fixed what was needed and it was done in a timely manner. I will be looking for them to do regular inspections in the future.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ming Soo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJzaIrU_br8_HyZdTNVVMSGS1KvPF83kuRUSm8G0eyjyBPj-A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"About one year ago, GVRD replaced my house’s touch-on roof which is still under a 12-year warranty. In late October (2018), a piece of fascia board around the chimney fell off from the roof. I called Chris, the owner of GVRD Roofing, with my cellphone a couple times but no call was returned. Then I sent him a couple of SMSs and followed up with an email with a picture of the fallen fascia board a week later, and again there was no reply from him. I then called him from my land phone with its number blocked at the receiving end, and this time Chris answered my call and thought I was a new customer. I told him the problem, and he said that he would send someone to fix it next Monday.
I sent him a reminder in the following Monday morning. I waited all day but no one from GVRD showed up. Due to the heavy raining was coming next day, I had to use whatever glue I have in my garage to attach the fallen fascia board back to the roof in that late afternoon. Afterward, I asked him to send someone to examine/fix the problem properly a few times, and finally he sent me a message that he would send someone to fix the problem. However, no one showed up again.
I sent the last request to Chris on February 1st, 2019 and mentioned that if he doesn’t send his guy to fix the problem, I will write a review about this complain. No message returned from him before I post this review.
If he doesn’t want to fix something broken within a year, what is a 12-year warranty for?

(18 Mar 2019) Comments on Chris' response:

1. I received no message from you either from my answering machine, SMS or email. Shouldn't you let me know which date and what time your team member came when I was not home?

2. In a professional manner, isn't it a courtesy to inform your customer before going to his house so he will be there to wait for you?

3. Is this the way you deal with your customers for warranty/after-service works by communicating through Google Reviews?

4. Because the sheet metal was not done properly the first time, that was why it fell down. Under warranty, it should be repaired in the way you installed it before and you should not charge for the repair. Period.

(24 April 2019) Two weeks ago, finally someone from GVRD came to resolve the problem. The roofer spent about 5 minutes to inspect the problem and applied proper sealant along the gap between the chimney and the sheet metal.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC49Zqpbg&fid=0x0:0x89aefde1fa01e25b"],"When":"2019-2-19"},{"Name":"Audrey Ple","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVn2viesIOzi9dZ9nbe1o9PIANNzO6j3rX9MsPlM8PokqyCmzh7aA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"2022: When I noticed a leak in my bedroom, I contact many roofers. Most did not get back to me. A few told me they were so busy, they had to turn customers away. GVRD Roofing stayed in touch with me and sent Marcos as soon as he had a spare moment. The repair took only 10 minutes, but I am so grateful to have it done. Marcos also said if I have any further problems, to just let him know. It was an overall excellent experience given the very difficult time we are having in BC right now with excessive rain and storms. I recommend GVRD Roofing Inc and thank the team for taking care of my roof.

2024: Because of the great service I got in 2022, when my roof leaked again this year, I contacted GVRD. Another amazing job. Roof leak is repaired and at the same time, the team replaced some broken vent and plumbing stacks and cleaned the moss from the roof for a very fair price. I hope my roof will hold out for another ten years. Thank you. I highly recommend GVRD Roofing Inc.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kyle Erickson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVpptr7nPYPPFk51OnQLvxP70onhM272AbvQ9GITiFEUAPoY5NtAg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Called them to repair an emergency leak in the upstairs bathroom roof. I explained the situation and was quoted 'a couple hundred'.  They sent someone over within a couple hours (this was the weekend too, I was impressed).

The guy came, took a look, found the hole in the roof (and 2 others), and told me he could seal them. I asked if he could also tarp one of the areas as well. He said he could, though he didn't think it was necessary. I asked him what the cost would be, and he said '5 or 6 hundred, though I'm not really the pricing guy so I don't know'. I mentioned the original guy we spoke to thought it would be a couple hundred but the guy on-site explained since it's more work than they thought so it would be more.

I agreed, and he did the work (and covered one of the areas with a tarp I bought). He left after less than 2 hours.

The next day I got an invoice for $1200, with no line items for what labour cost, materials, anything. Just $1200 and a couple lines of descriptors.

I called to ask about the massive discrepancy and he said 'oh, that what the on-site guy said to charge... I guess I'll talk to him again' which didn't instill confidence in me. He sent a revised invoice for $750 a little later.

I'm glad it's not $1200 but I would encourage anyone working with GVRD Roofing to get a quote in writing, and also sign off on work to be done with a quoted amount.

To be clear, the roofing work seems fine (and I'm glad they were able to come so quickly), it's just the quoting and invoicing that I have a problem with. Paying 3.5 times the amount quoted over the phone, and still more than the on-site guy's estimate doesn't feel great.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"KS","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtKmg2d7VY1fg4qgOYMXm8c1Sm9A2nK6P09OWCMjWauDiPSbQxag=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a missing vent cap cover on my roof that needed to be installed ASAP. Called them on a Sat, Dan showed up at the time he said he would Sunday morning. However I had not received a quote so there was some back and forth with Dan and his boss - they ended up quoting me something competitive to another quote I had received so I went ahead with having Dan proceed to add a new vent cap cover. While on the roof Dan identified my deteriorating roof caps and suggested I replace them soon to make the roof last longer. As well he helped me secure down other vent caps to avoid having them get dislodged. Overall Dan was professional and a good communicator.  There was some mix up with the invoice afterwards with his boss Chris but it was quickly resolved and I am happy with their help last minute on a weekend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Athena Affan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXjXsPuRi1sb0jy0PJsygOjvpMXmO2J_yu4Flo3mbsnahkLGFS2Hg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Thank you so much Chris for helping us address a persistent leak! GVRD Roofing was quick to respond to my call and got someone out to take a look and assess the problem the same day. They sent us pictures showing where they felt the issue was and communicated the work that they anticipated needed to be done. They did a quick fix right away to stop the leak with a plan to come back to do a more fullsome repair later.

When the fix wasn't sufficient, I called Chris who sent his team back to take another look and complete the work.  Initially we were not satisfied with the work that was done, because the issue was not resolved. I got in touch with Chris who took our concernse seriously and sent his team out one last time with really experienced roofers, and the assurance that they'd do the absolute best they could. It paid off, and now - no more leak!

Chris is dedicated to providing quality work, and is flexible and easy to work with. I highly recommend GVRD Roofing for fast and reliable roofing needs.

Thanks!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bob Burrowes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLQDp0weGABv_yTyNgbFKVXRyWEQOVpweKl531fnrSrhQGbEA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"GVRD Roofing did a great job on our commercial building.
